name: git-github
description: Everyday git/GitHub operations for Claude Code: draft commits and PRs that match the repo's style, run a single-tool authoritative code review, dispatch the same diff to sibling CLIs (codex/gemini/opencode) for multi-model second opinions, audit code comments for explanatory value, audit GitHub Actions workflows for errors and outdated actions, review and tighten READMEs, audit dependency licenses and pick a project LICENSE, and cut release tags. Skills auto-trigger on natural language; nothing autoposts, force-pushes, or rewrites history.
